intended_use: Sonic DL is a Deep Learning based image reconstruction technique that is available for use on GE Healthcare 1.5T and 3.0T MR systems. Sonic DL reconstructs MR images from highly under-sampled data, an
intended_use_full: Sonic DL is a Deep Learning based image reconstruction technique that is available for use on GE Healthcare 1.5T and 3.0T MR systems. Sonic DL reconstructs MR images from highly under-sampled data, and thereby enables highly accelerated acquisitions. Sonic DL is intended for cardiac imaging, and for patients of all ages.
ground_truth: Conventional 2D FIESTA Cine with ASSET acceleration imaging (predicate device); fully sampled images from MRXCAT and digital phantoms for nonclinical testing
other_metrics: Nonclinical model accuracy metrics: Peak-Signal-to-Noise (PSNR), Root-Mean-Square Error (RMSE), Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM), Mean Absolute Error (MAE). Inter-method variability (coefficient of variability) for functional measurements (left ventricular volumes, ejection fraction, cardiac output) was smaller than inter-observer intra-method variability for conventional ASSET Cine images. Sonic DL images rated as diagnostic quality with significant scan time reduction compared to conventional ASSET Cine images.
